title: Nuclear Assurance Engineer (Contract)
description_raw:
Sellafield Ltd requires a Nuclear Assurance Engineer to provide independent assurance over mechanical plant decommissioning work packages within a Category A nuclear facility.

The role supports the Independent Safety Assessor (ISA) function, reviewing work package instructions, safety cases, and lift plans for compliance with NDA and ONR expectations.

Key responsibilities:
- Conduct structured independent assurance reviews of mechanical work packages
- Review decommissioning safety cases for mechanical plant (pumps, vessels, pipework)
- Attend safety review committees and represent ISA function
- Maintain assurance records in the site EDMS (Electronic Document Management System)
- Identify and track non-conformances through to close-out

Profile:
- Degree in mechanical engineering or equivalent
- 5+ years in nuclear or high-hazard mechanical environments
- SQEP (Suitably Qualified and Experienced Person) designation advantageous
- Knowledge of nuclear LC28, LC36 inspection and test requirements
- SC clearance held or clearable

Rate: £620/day outside IR35
Duration: 12 months
Start: August 2026
Location: Sellafield site
